problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: If Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
